FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Hillier for petitioners; Peter Myers for Wells Fargo Trust.

Mr. Myers stated that Wells Fargo Trust had filed its accounting on Friday, June 3, 2016. He stated that his client intended to bring a petition to withdraw court supervision of the trust. The Court ordered the status hearing re future accounting off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not reported)

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Continued To Jun-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Continued To May-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order On Waiver Of Notice Modifying Trust Terms And Waiving Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Hillier for (petitioner) Nancy Bechtle.

The Court asked if there was anything else to report regarding the modification. Mr. Hillier stated that per the examiner's notes they will remove the word successor and submit a revised order and requested that a clause be added to allow the serving trustee to appoint a successor trustee if needed in the future. The Court stated that an accounting is required for the benefit of the beneficiaries and will not be waived. The petition for order on waiver of notice modifying trust terms and waiving accounting was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Henry. (Not Reported)
